hooks.command: sh -c 'if [ "${AGENT_WALLET_NO_AUTO_BOOTSTRAP:-0}" = "1" ]; then "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/bootstrap_backend.sh" check >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo "AgentLayer wallet backend is not installed. Run /wallet-setup to install it."; else "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/bootstrap_backend.sh" install >&2; fi'
